metadata.name: ww-input-basic
metadata.description: A versatile form input element supporting text, email, password, number, decimal, date, time, phone, color, and currency types with validation.
features: Multiple input types (text, textarea, email, password, number, decimal, date, time, tel, color, currency)
Currency formatting with symbol, separators, decimal places
Min/max constraints for numbers and dates
Textarea with configurable rows and resize

properties.name: placeholderColor
properties.description: Mandatory color of the placeholder text. Inactive when advancedPlaceholder (inherited from ww-text) is true.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when advancedPlaceholder (inherited from ww-text) is true.

properties.name: initValue
properties.description: Initial value of the input

properties.name: type
properties.description: Input type

properties.name: displayPassword
properties.description: Show/hide password toggle. Inactive when type is not 'password'.

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: Whether the input is read-only

properties.name: required
properties.description: Whether the input is required

properties.name: precision
properties.description: Decimal precision for decimal type. Inactive when type is not 'decimal'.

properties.name: step
properties.description: Step increment for number/decimal types. Inactive when type is not 'decimal' and not 'number'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when type is not 'decimal' and not 'number'.

properties.name: timePrecision
properties.description: Time precision: 3600 (hh), 60 (hh:mm), 1 (hh:mm:ss), 0.1 (hh:mm:ss.s). Inactive when type is not 'time'.

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: Placeholder text. Supports multi-language object. Inactive when type is 'date' or 'time'.

properties.name: rows
properties.description: Number of rows for textarea type. Inactive when type is not 'textarea'.

properties.name: resize
properties.description: Allow textarea resize. Inactive when type is not 'textarea'.

properties.name: min
properties.description: Minimum value for number/decimal types. Inactive when type is not 'number' and not 'decimal'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when type is not 'number' and not 'decimal'.

properties.name: max
properties.description: Maximum value for number/decimal types. Inactive when type is not 'number' and not 'decimal'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when type is not 'number' and not 'decimal'.

properties.name: minDate
properties.description: Minimum date in yyyy-mm-dd format. Inactive when type is not 'date'.

properties.name: maxDate
properties.description: Maximum date in yyyy-mm-dd format. Inactive when type is not 'date'.

properties.name: hideArrows
properties.description: Hide number input arrows. Inactive when type is not 'number' and not 'decimal'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when type is not 'number' and not 'decimal'.

properties.name: debounce
properties.description: Enable debounce on value changes

properties.name: debounceDelay
properties.description: Debounce delay (1-5000ms). Inactive when debounce is false.

properties.name: autocomplete
properties.description: Enable browser autocomplete

properties.name: fieldName
properties.description: Field name used for form data when inside a form container. Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy).

properties.name: customValidation
properties.description: Enable custom validation formula. Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy).

properties.name: validation
properties.description: Custom validation formula. Inactive when the element is not in a form container or when customValidation is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when the element is not placed inside a form container (sidePanelContent.form?.uid is falsy) or when customValidation is false.

properties.name: currencyShowSymbol
properties.description: Show currency symbol. Inactive when type is not 'currency'.

properties.name: currencySymbol
properties.description: Currency symbol character. Inactive when currencyShowSymbol is false or type is not 'currency'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when currencyShowSymbol is false or type is not 'currency'.

properties.name: currencySymbolPosition
properties.description: Currency symbol position: before or after. Inactive when currencyShowSymbol is false or type is not 'currency'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when currencyShowSymbol is false or type is not 'currency'.

properties.name: currencyDecimalPlaces
properties.description: Number of decimal places for currency. Inactive when type is not 'currency'.

properties.name: currencyThousandsSeparator
properties.description: Thousands separator character. Inactive when type is not 'currency'.

properties.name: currencyDecimalSeparator
properties.description: Decimal separator character. Inactive when type is not 'currency'.

properties.name: currencySymbolColor
properties.description: Color of the currency symbol. Inactive when type is not 'currency'.

properties.name: currencySymbolFontSize
properties.description: Font size of the currency symbol. Inactive when type is not 'currency'.

properties.name: currencySymbolPadding
properties.description: Padding around the currency symbol. Inactive when type is not 'currency'.

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when the input value changes

events.name: initValueChange
events.description: Triggered when the initial bound value changes

events.name: onEnterKey
events.description: Triggered when the Enter key is pressed

events.name: focus
events.description: Triggered when the input receives focus

events.name: blur
events.description: Triggered when the input loses focus

variables.name: value
variables.description: The current value of the input

specifications: Currency type provides formatted number input with symbol display
Inside a form container, set fieldName for form data binding
For styling, always set placeholderColor, especially in dark mode
